name: Signature: Decline

description.en: Formally decline a signature request. This records your refusal on-chain.
description.de: Eine Signaturanfrage formal ablehnen. Die Ablehnung wird on-chain verzeichnet.
description.fr: Refuser formellement une demande de signature. Le refus est enregistre on-chain.
description.es: Rechaza formalmente una solicitud de firma. El rechazo queda registrado on-chain.
description.ro: Respinge formal o cerere de semnatura. Refuzul este inregistrat on-chain.

bot: Declines a signature request on behalf of an eligible signer. Query getRequest first to confirm the document title so the user can review before declining.

inputs.name: Creator Email

description.en: Email of the request creator to notify about the decline.
description.de: E-Mail des Erstellers, der über die Ablehnung informiert wird.
description.fr: E-mail du createur a notifier du refus.
description.es: Correo del creador para notificar el rechazo.
description.ro: E-mailul creatorului pentru a notifica refuzul.

inputs.bot: Email address of the creator who sent the signature request.

success.en: Request declined. The creator has been notified.
success.de: Anfrage abgelehnt. Der Ersteller wurde benachrichtigt.
success.fr: Demande refusee. Le createur a ete notifie.
success.es: Solicitud rechazada. Se ha notificado al creador.
success.ro: Cerere respinsa. Creatorul a fost notificat.
